description: Core party master table in Oracle Trading Community Architecture. Each record represents a person, organization, or group used as the shared business identity for customers, suppliers, banks, and other trading partners across Oracle EBS modules.

columns.name: PARTY_ID
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the party record shared across Oracle EBS modules.

columns.name: PARTY_NUMBER
columns.description: Business reference number assigned to the Trading Community party.

columns.name: PARTY_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with party.

columns.name: PARTY_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control party processing.

columns.name: VALIDATED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether validated applies to the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that last updated the record.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.description: Login session identifier that performed the last update.

columns.name: REQUEST_ID
columns.description: Concurrent request identifier for the program run that created or updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
columns.description: Oracle application identifier for the concurrent program that last updated the record.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that created the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

columns.name: PROGRAM_ID
columns.description: Concurrent program identifier for the process that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the concurrent program last updated the record.

columns.name: WH_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with wh update.

columns.name: ORIG_SYSTEM_REFERENCE
columns.description: Reference to the originating source system record used during integration or conversion.

columns.name: SIC_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying sic for the record.

columns.description: Business attribute of the party used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

business_questions: Show party master details for customers or suppliers.
Find the party record associated with a customer account.
List organizations or persons by party name or number.
Show party records referenced by receivables customers.
Identify parties used across multiple Oracle modules.
Display party master information for reporting and integration.
Find duplicate or similar party names for review.
Trace a party to downstream customer account usage.
